title: corynabutilon salicifolium
intro: Corynabutilon salicifolium, also known as Willow-leaf Flower or Yellow-flowering Spiny Broom, is a flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is a shrub with yellow flowers and is native to Mexico and parts of Central America. Corynabutilon salicifolium has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as colds, flu, and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal use, and its leaves, flowers, and roots are used in traditional medicine to promote health and well-being.
